descriptions.1: Land preparation, soil analysis, input procurement and irrigation infrastructure setup.
descriptions.2: Crop establishment, seed or seedling planting and base fertilization application.
descriptions.3: Crop maintenance, pest control, growth fertilization and development monitoring.
descriptions.4: Product harvesting, post-harvest quality control and storage preparation.
descriptions.5: Packaging, transport logistics and product delivery to the exporter per contract.

detail.title: Phase Detail
detail.noDetails: Funds not yet released for this phase
